nasb.text: In the second year of Pekah the son of Remaliah king of Israel, Jotham the son of Uzziah king of Judah became king.

esv.text: In the second year of Pekah the son of Remaliah, king of Israel, Jotham the son of Uzziah, king of Judah, began to reign.

cnv.text: 以色列王利瑪利的兒子比加在位第二年，烏西雅的兒子約坦登基作猶大王。

ccb.text: 利玛利的儿子以色列王比加执政第二年，犹大王乌西雅的儿子约坦登基。
